en: "But now, hear my speech, O Job, and listen to all my words.
zh: “可是，約伯啊，請聽我的言語， 留心聽我的一切話。

en: Behold, I open my mouth; the tongue in my mouth speaks.
zh: 我現在開口， 用舌頭發言；

en: My words declare the uprightness of my heart, and what my lips know they speak sincerely.
zh: 我的話表明我心中的正直， 我所知道的，我的嘴唇就誠誠實實地說出來。

en: The Spirit of God has made me, and the breath of the Almighty gives me life.
zh: 神的靈創造了我， 全能者的氣使我存活。

en: Answer me, if you can; set your words in order before me; take your stand.
zh: 你若能夠辦得到，就回答我， 用話語攻擊我， 表明立場，當面攻擊我。

en: Behold, I am toward God as you are; I too was pinched off from a piece of clay.
zh: 在 神面前我與你一樣， 也是用土捏造的。

en: Behold, no fear of me need terrify you; my pressure will not be heavy upon you.
zh: 我的威嚴必不驚嚇你， 我的壓力也不加重在你身上。

en: "Surely you have spoken in my ears, and I have heard the sound of your words.
zh: 你所說的，我已經聽見了，也聽到你言語的聲音，說：

en: You say, 'I am pure, without transgression; I am clean, and there is no iniquity in me.
zh: ‘我是潔淨的，毫無過犯； 我是清白的，沒有罪孽。

en: Behold, he finds occasions against me, he counts me as his enemy,
zh: 神找機會攻擊我， 把我當作仇敵；

en: he puts my feet in the stocks and watches all my paths.'
zh: 他把我的兩腳上了木狗， 又鑒察我一切所行的。’

en: "Behold, in this you are not right. I will answer you, for God is greater than man.
zh: 我要告訴你，你這話錯了， 因為 神比世人大。

en: Why do you contend against him, saying, 'He will answer none of man's words'?
zh: 你為甚麼對 神爭辯， 說：‘無論世人的甚麼話，他都不回答’呢？

en: For God speaks in one way, and in two, though man does not perceive it.
zh: 原來 神用這個方法或那個方法說了， 只是，世人沒有留意。

en: In a dream, in a vision of the night, when deep sleep falls on men, while they slumber on their beds,
zh: 世人都在床上打盹， 沉睡臨到他們的時候， 神用異夢與夜間的異象，

en: then he opens the ears of men and terrifies them with warnings,
zh: 告訴他們， 他堅定他們所得的訓誨，

en: that he may turn man aside from his deed and conceal pride from a man;
zh: 好叫人離開自己的惡行， 又叫人與驕傲隔絕，

en: he keeps back his soul from the pit, his life from perishing by the sword.
zh: 攔阻人的性命不下在坑裡， 又阻止他的生命不死在刀下。

en: "Man is also rebuked with pain on his bed and with continual strife in his bones,
zh: 人在床上被痛苦懲治， 他的骨頭不住地痛苦掙扎，

en: so that his life loathes bread, and his appetite the choicest food.
zh: 以致他的生命厭惡食物， 他的胃口也厭惡美食，

en: His flesh is so wasted away that it cannot be seen, and his bones that were not seen stick out.
zh: 他的肌肉消瘦以致看不見， 以前看不見的骨頭，現在都凸出來。

en: His soul draws near the pit, and his life to those who bring death.
zh: 他的性命接近深坑， 他的生命靠近滅命的天使。

en: If there be for him an angel, a mediator, one of the thousand, to declare to man what is right for him,
zh: 在一千位天使之中， 若有一位作人的中保，指示人當行的事，

en: and he is merciful to him, and says, 'Deliver him from going down into the pit; I have found a ransom;
zh: 恩待他，說： ‘救贖他免下深坑； 我已經得到了贖價。’

en: let his flesh become fresh with youth; let him return to the days of his youthful vigor';
zh: 他的肌肉就比孩童的更嫩， 他更恢復滿有青春活力的日子。

en: then man prays to God, and he accepts him; he sees his face with a shout of joy, and he restores to man his righteousness.
zh: 他向 神祈求， 神就喜悅他， 他也歡呼著朝見 神的面， 人又恢復自己的義。

en: He sings before men and says: 'I sinned and perverted what was right, and it was not repaid to me.
zh: 他在人面前歌唱，說： ‘我犯了罪，顛倒是非， 但我沒有受到應得的報應。

en: He has redeemed my soul from going down into the pit, and my life shall look upon the light.'
zh: 他救贖我的性命免入深坑， 我的生命必得見光明。’

en: "Behold, God does all these things, twice, three times, with a man,
zh: 神總是三番四次， 向人行這一切事，

en: to bring back his soul from the pit, that he may be lighted with the light of life.
zh: 要把人的性命從深坑裡救回來， 好使活人之光光照他。

en: Pay attention, O Job, listen to me; be silent, and I will speak.
zh: 約伯啊，你當留心聽我， 當默不作聲，我要說話。

en: If you have any words, answer me; speak, for I desire to justify you.
zh: 你若有話說，就請回答我； 你只管說吧，因為我願意以你為義。

en: If not, listen to me; be silent, and I will teach you wisdom."
zh: 你若沒有話說，就要聽我說， 你當默不作聲，我就把智慧教導你。”
